programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Airtime Ep12: Kiteboarding The British Virgin Islands
programme.desc: Catch wind of a jet-set journey through the British Virgin Islands with British Virgin billionaire, Richard Branson and kiteboarding royalty Martin Vari and Ceridwen Jones. Highlights include a fourteen-mile kiteboarding regatta, magnificent scenery and epic freeriding.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep307: Cliff Diving, Kitefoiling and Waterski Jumping
programme.desc: This WOW episode features Red Bull Cliff Diving in an underground lake in Romania's famous Turda salt mine; the European Kitefoil Championships in Spain; and the Moomba Masters men’s and women’s waterski jumping in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.title: Blue World Ep505: Mayan Underworld - Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Mexico’s Yucatan, Blue World explores remote cenotes in the jungle that were once used for Mayan rituals. Just reaching the surface of the water requires rappelling down from the forest above. But then, beneath the surface, we encounter strange alien life forms that live in total darkness, and the remains of humans and animal sacrifices from an ancient culture.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep406: Paddling Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Among the numerous islands and atolls of Papua New Guinea, Nikki Gregg experiences traditional festivals, charged canoe races and embarks on an exploratory trip down a remote river.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep111: Aquabike World Championship Series Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The Grand Prix of Portugal continues with a focus on the Aquabike Runabout Division.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep204: Ixtapa, Mexico
programme.desc: Segments include swimming with Dolphins; sea kayaking; the Zihuatanejo Market; exploring a Coconut Plantation; clay tile making; Las Brisas Ixtapa and live music at Bandidos.

programme.title: Airtime Ep55: Kayaking Norway…Romancing The Rapids
programme.desc: The swollen waterways of Norway’s backcountry provide the challenge as a group of world-class kayakers take on Class 5 whitewater in this adventure of a lifetime. These pros seek out the most difficult lines and spectacular waterfalls set against the wild beauty that's Norway.

programme.title: Xplash Ep109
programme.desc: Xplash brings you amazing action in, on, and near water. In this episode, we’ll fly high with kiteboarder Kevin Langeree; take a look at what's being done to progress the sport of Hydro Flight; and start things off by kayaking from the top of a snow-covered mountain.

programme.title: Blue World Ep604: Exploring Devil's Hole Cave in Nevada, USA
programme.desc: One of the largest aquifers in the United States is located directly beneath Death Valley. Blue World is invited to join a team of scientists working at Devil’s Hole Cave in Nevada and is afforded a once-in-a-lifetime permit from the National Park Service to dive in Devil’s Hole Cave. Fewer than 20 people have ever been allowed to dive in this otherworldly cave system.

programme.title: Perspektiv
programme.desc: David Carrier-Porcheron is a titan in the snowboarding community. When the COVID-19 pandemic hit, DCP and family were left stranded in Costa Rica. Perspektiv tells the story of his return to snow after 13 months. Watch as he rediscovers his love of snowboarding, and why he can’t live without it.

programme.title: A New Beginning
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Winter Leisure
programme.desc: Legendary snowboarder Terje Haakonsen finds new joy in riding small parks and mellow terrain wherever he goes, explaining, “What I like about snowskates is that it makes small hills big again.” Join us for this fascinating look at snowskate subculture.

programme.title: Mission Antarctic
programme.desc: ‘Mission Antarctic’ is a snowboarding expedition to the world’s end. Xavier de le Rue and Lucas DeBari set out from the Falklands on a 20-meter sailboat, navigating the Drake Passage to explore the Antarctic Peninsula. Awarded ‘Best Freeride Movie’ at the 2013 International Freeride Film Festival.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Yellow Flickers
programme.desc: Do the lines in the road countdown to a supposed arrival? Or are they added up within us, allowing us to grow?

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: NowHere
programme.desc: A 2010 winter journey with riders facing harsh conditions and deeper questions. This Absinthe Films documentary explores perception, purpose, and the fine line between feeling lost and finding where you truly belong.

programme.title: Flipside - NowHere Episode 1
programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. Follow the life and times of a handful of the most progressive and entertaining riders in snowboarding. Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: En Route America
programme.desc: A road trip across the West Coast, following skiers as they explore iconic mountains and chase winter conditions across the United States.

programme.title: En Route Departure
programme.desc: Follow Pep Fujas, Blake Nyman, Anthony Boronowski, Dylan Hood, Eric Pollard, Chris Benchetler and more as they chase storms from a Top Secret Military Mountain Warfare Facility, to the Italian Alps.

programme.title: Falling Angels
programme.desc: Three female BASE jumpers trek deep into the Venezuelan jungle to attempt a historic jump from the world’s highest waterfall, facing extreme terrain, technical challenges, and one of the most dangerous exits in the sport.

programme.title: Gunnie Season
programme.desc: An extreme skiing film featuring some of the world’s top professional skiers pushing their limits on snow and steep terrain.

programme.title: Peace and Left
programme.desc: A surf series following Hugues Oyarzabal, capturing spectacular first-person barrel footage at iconic spots around the globe, offering a rare inside view of high-performance surfing.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we are travelling to the other side of the world for the second act of the Kitefoil World Series to see if Toni Vodisek can keep up with his great performance beating and second fleet after Gizzeria. The 19-year-old Slovenian has secured his first regatta on the professional kite racing circuit. Will he beat the lead from Axel Mazella?

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking a domestic flight to the east coast of Fujian Province, Pingtan, for the Kitefoil World Series. The long sandy beaches and good weather conditions are placing Pingtan second most touristic island of China and if you combine its good winds, Pingtan makes perfect venue for Kiteboarding!

programme.title: Elevation Church Live
programme.desc: Welcome to Elevation Church. See what God can do through you.

programme.title: Not As Long As My Song!
programme.desc: Hitting your limit isn’t a sign of weakness; it’s an invitation to shift your perspective. When the enemy brings the battle to your mind, remember that he only attacks what’s valuable. And God’s goodness is your secret weapon to win the fight.

programme.title: Hand Him The Plan
programme.desc: Sometimes the battle in your mind is proof that God’s trying to do something great in your heart. What you see isn’t the full picture of what God has for you. When you hand God your plans, you make room for His purpose.

programme.title: Sinking In The Storm
programme.desc: When you feel like you’re starting to sink in the storm, call on the name of Jesus. He’s near, and He won’t let you go down. Don’t panic and obsess over the problem, because when you sync up with Jesus, things can change just that quick.

programme.title: Delivered Daily
programme.desc: “God, can You get me out of this?” It’s a prayer we’ve all prayed. But what if God’s answer isn’t escape, but endurance? What if His rescue comes one day at a time? This message will help you recognize God’s faithful provision in every season and learn how to trust His hand as He leads you through.

programme.title: Same Lies New Loops
programme.desc: The enemy loves to trap you in the same old lies: “It’s not enough” and “You’re not loved.” But God’s truth breaks the cycle. When you change what you say, you change what you see, and His presence opens a new loop of peace and hope.

programme.title: He Answered
programme.desc: Pastor Steven gives us three things to remember when life is hard. The enemy wants to keep us circling the wilderness, but God will bring us through as we learn to repeat what leads us to victory.

programme.desc: Rock music of the late 60's to the 80's. Relive the wonders of classic rock, the sound that revolutionized the world of music from the ‘60s to the ‘80s.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte 2
programme.desc: Después de desmantelar a una poderosa secta los misteriosos crímenes continúan y la policía se dedica a investigar quien es el nuevo líder de la organización para atraparlo y acabar con la violencia.

programme.title: La Mujer que Hablaba con Los Muertos
programme.desc: Es un film de Terror. Cuando Elena Castaño era una niña, tenía un don: era capaz de comunicarse con los espíritus de los muertos. pero esa capacidad desapareció al crecer.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: El Secuestro
programme.desc: Un joven con talento en la música sueña con ser un gran artista hasta que conoce al hijo de un poderoso narcotraficante colombiano quién promete ayudarlo a cambio de que trabaje para ellos. El joven no se imagina en que mundo se está metiendo. La fama le costará lo que más ama.

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: 4 Metros
programme.desc: 4 METROS relata, en tono de comedia romántica, la historia de un hombre entrando en la crisis de los 40. Joaquín tiene un zumbido en los oídos y poco sabe de sí mismo. Se ha dejado llevar sin intervenir demasiado en sus deseos. No escucha su voz interior. Su vida afectiva y laboral no tienen rumbo. El zumbido quizá sea la expresión, no asumida ni entendida todavía, de un ruido metafórico de la vida gritándole por dónde ir. Su novia tiene 20 años menos, aparece la presión social y familiar sobre la paternidad, sentirse útil, la vocación, el trabajo y cómo ser feliz. Hasta que otra mujer irrumpe y todo parece acomodarse. Pero siempre el orden debe ser interno. Así, como si el destino tomara la palabra, su vida cambiará 4 metros abajo del agua, donde aparece un sendero para encontrar la identidad.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.
